creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for this bug report against the softdep code.
However, the softdep code has been somewhat rewritten since this bug was file. Please accept our apologies for the tardy response, but the code quoted no longer exists in our tree. A large number of softdep bugs have been fixed in the interim. Should you still see this problem happening in FreeBSD 13 or newer, please don't hesitate to file a new bug.
